scripts.dev: npm run build --workspace core && npm run dev --workspaces
scripts.typecheck: npm run build --workspace core && npm run build --workspace client && npx tsc -p server/tsconfig.json --noEmit && npx tsc -p tsconfig.playwright.json --noEmit
scripts.railway:predeploy: npm run prisma:migrate:deploy --workspace server && npm run prisma:seed --workspace server && npm run knowledge-base:import --workspace server
